Appearances:
Plaintiff 1020 Post St. LLC is present. Represented by Joe Dudley.
Attorney Daniel stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kalu Chimobi is present.
Attorney Elle D. Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of May 13, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
